# render-contributions

Contributes a `Contributions.FacetTable` tab to the Studio Contributions view showing all static
contributions aggregated across plugins, with slot, id, and plugin columns.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin contributions table in the Studio Contributions view.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Contributions.FacetTable` "Contributions"
  - Uses: `apps/studio/contributions.Contributions`, `apps/studio/contributions.defineFacetTable`, `apps/studio/contributions.FacetTableEntry`, `apps/studio/contributions.PluginChip`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
